titleStmt.title: SII 4.780: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 780. (A.R. No. 326 of 1892). ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE ROOF OF THE VIGHNESVARA SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© ¿ Āsīddu¨rjjaya
vaṁśavā¨rddhirajanīnādhassu
dhāsaṁstitaḥ śrīmadgujjayapōta
bhūpatilakaḥ saukhyēramābhīpsitaḥ
. prāgīśā¨rppitacakrava¨rttivi
bhavaḥ kī¨rtyaṁganāmaṁga
ḷaḥ śrīvēṁgīviṣayāṁganā
surama(rama)ṇassaujanya
ratnākaraḥ [. 1*] tasyānvavāyā
tsaṁjātō vīracōḍakṣitīśvaraḥ .
rājēṁdrētīha vikyātaḥ kōna
kaṁḍrāḍivallabhaḥ [. 2*] tasyātma
jōbhavaccūrō bhīmō bhīma
parākramaḥ . śaśāsa kārōḥ pu
trasya nagarīṁ sumanōramā
ṁ [. 3*] tasya putrōbhavaddhātryā
ṁ śaraṇāgatavatsalaḥ . vidva
jjanamanōṁbhbhōjasaptāśvaścōḍabhū
patiḥ [. 4*] tasya putrōbhavaddhīmān śiva
bhaktiparāyaṇaḥ . tyāgipōtā
dipaḥ śrīmadbhōgasaṁva¨rddhanānujaḥ
[. 5*] nayaśāstrā¨rtthatatvajñō [I]
ytamāṁbā sunaṁdanaḥ [.] sū
rapōtādhipa One line of writing appears to have been cut off below this.

suvimalaṁ dhai¨ryyāmarādri¨rbhriśaṁ (.)
bhīmasōmapadābjamattamadhupaḥ
śrīcōḍabhūpātmajaḥ . prādāddī
pamakhaṁḍava¨rttitaśikhaṁ mallēśvarā
ya kṣitau [. 7*] śrīmallēśvaradēvāya
namaḥ . svasti samadhigatapaṁccama
hāśabdamahāmaṁḍalēśvara parama
māhēśvara vijaAvāṭikāpurēśva
ra trisaptatigrāmādhīśvara cā
lukyakulavallabha prāsādalabdharā
jyapadavīvirājamāna vikramabhīma
Abhinavarāma cālukyakaṭakavajra
prākāra parāṁgganādūra dāAvenneṛva
guṇa rācaguḍiyaArigirikuliśā
yudha śau¨ryyacakrāyudha dai¨ryya
nāgēṁdra vibhavamahēṁdra du¨rjjayaku
lā¨rjjuna parahitabhāṣaṇa patihita
bhūṣaṇa sāhasasūdraka vairirāja
nyamukhamudraka vānarāAtārakaṣa
ḍānana yirugamadēbhapaṁcānana
vinōdaviddyādhara vīravrikōdara Aṁ
dhramaṁḍalamāṇikya yyupā
yacāṇākya yudāradadhīci kāṁ
ccīsudhārōci cauvuḷikasēnāṁbudharaprala
yavātūla śatruṁdripālabhīla duggana
rēṁdracūṟa paṁḍiyavini¨rjjita śauvu
camahāvrata buddhava¨rmmānvayavidvaThe stone is cut off below this line.

svasti . sakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1135 gu nēṁṭi mē
ṣasaṁkrāṁttinimityamuna bejavāḍa
mallīśvara śrīmahādēvaraku Akhaṁ
ṁḍadīpamunaku kōnakaṁḍrāḍi bhīma
rājulu Iccina modavulu 25 . Ā
ṁbōtunu niccitimi . vīniṁ jēkoni
koṁḍebōyuṁḍu tana putrānu
pautrikamu Ācaṁtrā¨rkkamu ni
tya māneṁḍu neyi naḍapaṁgalavā
ru niṁgimiṟṟulapallamuna bōyi
nki bhūmi na 10 .
Digital edition of SII 4.780 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
